title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: tuned bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for tuned is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Applications for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Solutions for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Applications for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Solutions for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for SAP Applications for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: Please add option which will wait for udev settle during startup
pyudev traceback when sync polling for the events
Please update TuneD to the latest version
Traceback in device_matcher_udev.py, line 17, AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'properties', when hotplugging network adapter

full_text:
An update for tuned is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
